summary: Quick-Resolve Feature Testing Complete - Backend 12/12 tests passed, Frontend UI working correctly. Quick-resolve button only appears for 'ownership_gap' action_key. For complex issues (momentum_drop, blocker, engagement_drop, family_inactive), the normal CTA button is shown instead.

issues: Console warning: span cannot be child of option - hydration issue (non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed actions created during backend API testing (18 test actions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick-resolve feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) quick_resolve field is always present in pod_top_action but is null for complex issues (blocker, momentum_drop, engagement_drop, family_inactive). 2) Only ownership_gap has quick_resolve populated with {label: 'Assign Owner', action: 'assign_owner', target_ids: [...]}. 3) Current test athletes (athlete_3, athlete_1, athlete_5) all have higher-priority issues than ownership_gap, so quick_resolve button won't show in UI for them. 4) POST /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/quick-resolve endpoint works correctly with proper validation (400 for unknown action, 400 for empty target_ids, 401 for unauthenticated). 5) Frontend conditionally renders pod-hero-quick-resolve button ONLY when qr is truthy, otherwise shows pod-hero-cta button.

test_classes: TestQuickResolveField - quick_resolve null for momentum_drop/blocker, field always present
TestQuickResolveEndpoint - assign_owner success, multiple actions, 400 for unknown action, 400 for missing target_ids, 401 for unauthorized
TestQuickResolvePersistence - action owner persisted in DB, pod_action_events created
TestQuickResolveConfig - complex issues excluded from quick_resolve

escalate_button_critical.details: Escalate button visible for critical urgency

feature_coverage.backend_GET_pod_top_action_quick_resolve: PASS - quick_resolve field present, null for non-eligible
feature_coverage.backend_POST_quick_resolve_assign_owner: PASS - assigns all target_ids to coach
feature_coverage.backend_quick_resolve_response_format: PASS - returns {resolved: true, action, updated_count, assigned_to}
feature_coverage.backend_db_persistence: PASS - action owner updated in DB
feature_coverage.backend_pod_action_events: PASS - creates events for each assignment
feature_coverage.frontend_quick_resolve_conditional: PASS - pod-hero-quick-resolve NOT shown when quick_resolve is null
